elements.title: Claire Foy
elements.contents: ... that Claire Foy (pictured) received awards at the 23rd and 24th Screen Actors Guild Awards for her portrayal of Queen Elizabeth II in The Crown?

elements.title: Seedance 2.0
elements.contents: ... that a fight between Brad Pitt and Tom Cruise, Friends characters reimagined as otters, and Will Smith battling a red-eyed spaghetti monster were early viral videos created with Seedance 2.0?

elements.title: TOI-1853 b
elements.contents: ... that TOI-1853 b is a Neptune-sized exoplanet that is denser than steel?

elements.title: Allan Williford
elements.contents: ... that Allan Williford went from being Indiana basketball's head coach to being president of the largest manufacturer of flight and space-mission simulators?

elements.title: Milk & Serial
elements.contents: ... that, after a year of trying to find a distributor for his film Milk & Serial, Curry Barker said "screw it" and released the full film on YouTube?

elements.title: an Anglican bishop
elements.contents: ... that an Anglican bishop advocated for laypeople being able to preside over Holy Communion?

elements.title: Shy Girl
elements.contents: ... that Hachette Book Group ceased publication of Shy Girl over suspected AI use?

elements.title: Eve
elements.contents: ... that Eve became one of only two platypuses to be exhibited outside Australia in more than 50 years when she arrived at the San Diego Zoo Safari Park?

elements.title: a world-champion skydiver
elements.contents: ... that a world-champion skydiver first jumped on a date?
